title: lippia asperrima
intro: Lippia asperrima, also known as African Basil, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Lippia asperrima include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Lippia asperrima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional African cooking for its flavorful and aromatic leaves.
